title: DoorDash Menu
description: Represents a store menu on the DoorDash marketplace, including categories, items, option groups, and modifiers.

menu_id.description: The unique identifier for the menu assigned by DoorDash.

last_updated.description: When the menu was last updated.

Category.description: A category grouping related menu items.

id.description: The unique identifier for this category.

name.description: The display name of the category.

sort_id.description: The sort order for this category.

MenuItem.description: A menu item available for ordering.

name.description: The display name of the item.

image_url.description: A URL to an image of the item.

is_active.description: Whether the item is currently available for ordering.

sort_id.description: The sort order for this item within its category.

OptionGroup.description: A group of selectable options or modifiers for a menu item.

id.description: The unique identifier for this option group.

name.description: The display name of the option group.

min_selections.description: The minimum number of options that must be selected.

max_selections.description: The maximum number of options that can be selected.

options.description: The available options in this group.

MenuOption.description: An individual option or modifier within an option group.

id.description: The unique identifier for this option.

name.description: The display name of the option.

price.description: The additional price for this option in cents.

is_active.description: Whether the option is currently available.
